name: Atlas Aide AGV Agent
description: Executes bounded routine support for a fictional dialysis-center POC; Atlas makes no medical judgment.

skills.name: Routine Item Delivery
skills.description: Deliver pre-approved water, coffee, or blanket to a known treatment chair.
examples: Deliver the pre-approved coffee to Chair 1.

skills.name: Chairside Evidence Collection
skills.description: Collect bounded simulator evidence without clinical interpretation.
examples: Collect the simulator-provided blood pressure at Chair 3.
